title: .readmedaddy.json
description: Per-repo configuration for readmedaddy: the readme-drift hook/detector and the CI guard. Every key is optional; omit a key to keep its default.

hook.description: The drift detector: Claude Code Stop hook and standalone --check.

enabled.description: false turns the detector off for this repo (all surfaces).

mode.description: Stop-hook insistence. auto: one nudge per drift event. notify: stderr only. enforce: every Stop until the README moves. off: hook disabled (--check unaffected).

readme.description: Path (relative to repo root) of the README the detector watches.

watch.description: Patterns whose changes imply README drift: exact paths, dir/** (prefix), **/name (suffix), or plain globs like docs/*.md.

guard.description: CI guard behavior (consumed by the GitHub Action from v0.3.0).

pr.description: Pull-request response: sticky advisory comment, failing check, or nothing.

main.description: Default-branch push response: pinned dashboard issue, failing job, or nothing.

sweep.description: Scheduled freshness sweep; reports into the same dashboard issue.

autofix.description: Opt-in tier 3: an agent refreshes the README and opens a fix PR. Costs LLM tokens; requires an API-key secret.

runner.description: off: no auto-fix. claude: anthropics/claude-code-action. command: run guard.autofix.command verbatim as the agent step.

command.description: Agent CLI invocation used when runner is "command". Contract: edit the working tree only — no commit, no push, no PR.
